title: Broadcaster audio chain — field physics before speakers
motto: Clean voltage on the wire: echo killed, static gated, dB shaped — then sound leaves.

chain.label: Rumble cut
chain.physics: field_lowcut — remove infrasonic pressure before gate

chain.label: Noise gate
chain.physics: entropy gate — silence below trust floor

chain.label: Echo cancel
chain.physics: sovereign AEC — reference mic cancels room reflection

chain.label: Static filter
chain.physics: repeat-field inspect — hiss and crackle before cochlea

chain.label: Peak limiter
chain.physics: ironclad peak — never clip the operator

combinatorics_gate: thermal_entropy_gate — defer heavy RNNoise when hot
